texto: But dying people don't need to be reminded that they're dying
autor: I feel they need to be reminded that they're still very much alive.
explicacao: Citação de I feel they need to be reminded that they're still very much alive. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “But dying people don't need to be reminded that they're dying” articula reflexao, nicole-curtis, dying em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
